result.name: Kethra
result.description: Kethra is a lithe, spotted fellic with striking yellow eyes that seem to glow in the dim light of the forest. His fur is a mix of white and grey, blending seamlessly with the snowy landscape of the fenmir highlands. Dressed in rugged leather armor adorned with small trophies from his hunts, he moves with a grace that belies his predatory nature. Perched on a branch, he surveys his surroundings, always alert for intruders or potential prey.

sections.name: Kethra
sections.motive: To protect his territory and hunt for sustenance.
sections.environment: fenmir_highlands, often found in wooded areas or rocky outcrops.
sections.combat: Prefers ambush tactics, using the environment to his advantage.
sections.interaction: Cautious but curious; he may offer assistance to those who respect his domain.
sections.use: Can serve as a guide through the highlands or a source of local lore.
sections.gm_intrusion: Kethra becomes suspicious of the party's intentions, leading to a tense standoff.
sections.loot: Fur pelts, small hunting traps, and a unique talisman that enhances stealth.
